PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.1A1. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES INVOLVING THE OWNERSHIP, POSSESSION, OR ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY AND RELATED MATTERS. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, NOT REPORTED.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) GIVEN THE CONTENTS OF THE CONTRACTS SHOWING REASONABLE RELIANCE; FACTS GIVING RISE TO DUTY TO DISCLOSE; ALLEGE AN ACTUAL PRESENT CONTROVERSY; AND ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ELDER ABUSE. PLAINTIFF HAS 20 DAYS TO AMEND. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Off Calendar

Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mitchell Sussman, 760.325.7191 for Plaintiff Charles Greenberg. (court call)
Tony Tootell and Joshua Parr 213.972.4500 for Defendants SVC-WEST, LLC & Shell Vacation, LLC.

Discussed. Plaintiff requests 20 days to amend. The defendants do not object.

The Court rules as follows: Demurrer To Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege facts (not conclusions) given the contents of the contracts showing reasonable reliance; facts giving rise to duty to disclose; allege an actual present controversy; and allege facts in support of each element of the cause of action for elder abuse. Plaintiff has 20 days to amend. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SVC-WEST, L.L.C., SHELL VACATIONS, L.L.C.'s DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at 9:30 a.m. per SF Local Rule 8.1A1. That department handles all cases involving the ownership, possession, or acquisition of real property and related matters.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-25-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No other appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Demurrer To Complaint is continued to August 20, 2019 on Court's own motion. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after August 20, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on July 25, 2019.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
